conversation.content: Let's have a math class. Today we are going to learn about the form of rare mount breeding premium in financial calculations in the world of Azeroth. It is different from conventional mathematical formulas in the real world and has a more fantasy flair.
My notebook is ready, let's begin.
In this world, the core formula specification for rare mount breeding premium is: its form is E = P × S².
I have noted down this specification.
This formula can be used to solve for the breeding premium E when the base price of the mount P and the speed level S are known.
Okay, I understand the application scenario of this specification.
